$comment: Plugin hook registration. SELF-DISCOVERING bootstrapper — mirrors the psotobverse-utils pattern (see that plugin's hooks/hooks.json for rationale). Resolves the plugin install dir at runtime: (1) CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT if set (terminal CLI), (2) ~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json installPath for this plugin, (3) cache glob fallback. Fails open (sys.exit(0)) if nothing resolves. Do NOT add a 'hooks' key in plugin.json — auto-discovered from this file; duplicating it causes 'Duplicate hooks file detected' and the whole plugin fails to load. No ${...} and no inner double quotes -> portable across bash/cmd/PowerShell.

hooks.command: python -c "import os,sys,json,glob,runpy; S='guard_data_export.py'; r=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT'); j=os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'); d=(json.load(open(j)) if (not r and os.path.exists(j)) else {}); r=r or next((sorted(v,key=lambda e:e.get('version',''))[-1].get('installPath') for k,v in d.get('plugins',{}).items() if k.startswith('datavidence-healthanalysis')), None); g=glob.glob(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/cache/*/datavidence-healthanalysis/*')); r=r or (sorted(g)[-1] if g else None); p=(os.path.join(r,'hooks',S) if r else None); (runpy.run_path(p, run_name='__main__') if (p and os.path.exists(p)) else sys.exit(0))"

python -c "import os,sys,json,glob,runpy; S='sap_lock.py'; r=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT'); j=os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'); d=(json.load(open(j)) if (not r and os.path.exists(j)) else {}); r=r or next((sorted(v,key=lambda e:e.get('version',''))[-1].get('installPath') for k,v in d.get('plugins',{}).items() if k.startswith('datavidence-healthanalysis')), None); g=glob.glob(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/cache/*/datavidence-healthanalysis/*')); r=r or (sorted(g)[-1] if g else None); p=(os.path.join(r,'hooks',S) if r else None); (runpy.run_path(p, run_name='__main__') if (p and os.path.exists(p)) else sys.exit(0))"
